response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and developer-tooling exposure (test frameworks, CI/CD, D-lang testing libraries, workshops), but the role requires a Level II people manager with at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years in a technical leadership role. The resume shows no direct reports, no headcount management, no performance-review or 1:1 ownership, and no organizational-change leadership. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015–2016, nothing recent at scale).
strengths: Strong developer-tooling background: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD, GitLab/Docker infra setup.
10+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, embedded; current Staff role at Google with AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure.
Demonstrated technical evangelism through workshops, Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, and conference talks — adjacent to managerial coaching.
concerns: No evidence of formal people management — no direct reports, 1:1s, performance reviews, or hiring responsibilities listed.
No organizational-change leadership experience to match the preferred 3-year requirement.
Limited and dated mobile-platform ecosystem experience; nothing indicating build-system or test-infra leadership at mobile-platform scale.

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure depth
